option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ProgressBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane prefHeight="860.0" prefWidth="1200.0" stylesheets="@../../styles/home.css" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.pidev.Controllers.client.QuizSessionController"> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED" styleClass="transparent-scroll"> <content> <VBox alignment="TOP_CENTER" styleClass="quiz-session-shell"> <children> <VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="quiz-session-frame" prefWidth="900.0" maxWidth="900.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="quiz-session-hero"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="quizTitleLabel" styleClass="quiz-session-hero-title" text="Quiz" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button onAction="#onTranslate" styleClass="courses-action-btn primary" text=" Traduire" /> <Button onAction="#onCloseWindow" styleClass="courses-action-btn secondary" text="Quitter la session" /> </children> </HBox> <Label fx:id="quizContextLabel" styleClass="quiz-session-hero-subtitle" text="Quiz du cours" /> </children> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="quiz-session-stats" alignment="CENTER"> <children> <VBox styleClass="quiz-metric-card" spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="questionCountLabel" styleClass="stat-value" text="0" /> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Questions" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="quiz-metric-card" spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="attemptLabel" styleClass="stat-value" text="1/3" /> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Tentative" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="quiz-metric-card" spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="requiredScoreLabel" styleClass="stat-value" text="70%" /> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Score requis" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="quiz-metric-card" spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="timeLimitLabel" styleClass="stat-value" text="∞" /> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Temps" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="introSection" spacing="16.0" styleClass="quiz-intro-card"> <children> <Label styleClass="assessment-title" text="Instructions" /> <Label styleClass="course-card-description" wrapText="true" text="• Lisez attentivement chaque question avant de repondre. • Une seule reponse est correcte par question. • Vous pouvez naviguer entre les questions a tout moment. • Vous pouvez modifier vos reponses avant de soumettre. • Un score minimum est requis pour valider." /> <Button fx:id="startQuizButton" onAction="#onStartQuiz" text="Demarrer la session" styleClass="quiz-primary-cta" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </children> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="questionSection" spacing="14.0" styleClass="quiz-question-panel" visible="false" managed="false"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" styleClass="quiz-question-topbar"> <children> <Label fx:id="questionNavLabel" styleClass="quiz-question-counter" text="Question 1 sur 1" /> <Label fx:id="answeredCounterLabel" styleClass="section-pill" text="0 / 0 repondues" /> <ProgressBar fx:id="questionProgressBar" progress="0.2" prefWidth="190.0" styleClass="quiz-progress-track" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label styleClass="quiz-language-badge" text="Navigation" /> <Label fx:id="timerBadgeLabel" styleClass="quiz-timer-badge" text="--:--" /> </children> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="liveScoreLabel" styleClass="section-pill" text="Score: 0 / 0" />
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="question-block"> <children> <Label fx:id="questionTextLabel" styleClass="question-title" wrapText="true" text="Question" /> <Label fx:id="questionFeedbackLabel" styleClass="course-empty-subtitle" text="" /> <VBox fx:id="answersContainer" spacing="10.0" /> </children> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <children> <Button fx:id="prevButton" onAction="#onPrevQuestion" styleClass="quiz-nav-button quiz-nav-prev" text="Question precedente" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button fx:id="nextButton" onAction="#onNextQuestion" styleClass="quiz-nav-button quiz-nav-next" text="Question suivante" /> <Button fx:id="finishButton" onAction="#onFinishQuiz" styleClass="quiz-nav-button quiz-nav-submit" text="Soumettre mes reponses" /> </children> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0" styleClass="quiz-quick-nav-wrap"> <children> <Label styleClass="quiz-quick-nav-title" text="Navigation rapide" /> <HBox fx:id="quickNavContainer" spacing="8.0" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="resultSection" spacing="12.0" styleClass="quiz-result-card" visible="false" managed="false"> <children> <Label fx:id="resultTitleLabel" styleClass="assessment-title" text="Resultat" /> <Label fx:id="resultSummaryLabel" styleClass="course-card-description" text="" /> <Label fx:id="resultScoreLabel" styleClass="result-score-badge" text="0 / 0" /> <Label fx:id="aiFeedbackLabel" styleClass="ai-feedback-box" text="" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <children> <Button fx:id="downloadCertButton" onAction="#onDownloadCertificate" styleClass="courses-action-btn primary" text="Télécharger le certificat" visible="false" managed="false" /> <Button onAction="#onRetry" styleClass="courses-action-btn primary" text="Recommencer la session" /> <Button onAction="#onCloseWindow" styleClass="courses-action-btn secondary" text="Quitter" /> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> </children> <padding> <Insets bottom="24.0" left="22.0" right="22.0" top="22.0" /> </padding> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ProgressBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane prefHeight="860.0" prefWidth="1200.0" stylesheets="@../../styles/home.css" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.pidev.Controllers.client.QuizSessionController"> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED" styleClass="transparent-scroll"> <content> <VBox alignment="TOP_CENTER" styleClass="quiz-session-shell"> <children> <VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="quiz-session-frame" prefWidth="900.0" maxWidth="900.0"> <children> <VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="quiz-session-hero"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="quizTitleLabel" styleClass="quiz-session-hero-title" text="Quiz" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button onAction="#onTranslate" styleClass="courses-action-btn primary" text=" Traduire" /> <Button onAction="#onCloseWindow" styleClass="courses-action-btn secondary" text="Quitter la session" /> </children> </HBox> <Label fx:id="quizContextLabel" styleClass="quiz-session-hero-subtitle" text="Quiz du cours" /> </children> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="quiz-session-stats" alignment="CENTER"> <children> <VBox styleClass="quiz-metric-card" spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="questionCountLabel" styleClass="stat-value" text="0" /> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Questions" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="quiz-metric-card" spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="attemptLabel" styleClass="stat-value" text="1/3" /> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Tentative" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="quiz-metric-card" spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="requiredScoreLabel" styleClass="stat-value" text="70%" /> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Score requis" /> </children> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="quiz-metric-card" spacing="6.0"> <children> <Label fx:id="timeLimitLabel" styleClass="stat-value" text="∞" /> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Temps" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="introSection" spacing="16.0" styleClass="quiz-intro-card"> <children> <Label styleClass="assessment-title" text="Instructions" /> <Label styleClass="course-card-description" wrapText="true" text="• Lisez attentivement chaque question avant de repondre. • Une seule reponse est correcte par question. • Vous pouvez naviguer entre les questions a tout moment. • Vous pouvez modifier vos reponses avant de soumettre. • Un score minimum est requis pour valider." /> <Button fx:id="startQuizButton" onAction="#onStartQuiz" text="Demarrer la session" styleClass="quiz-primary-cta" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </children> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="questionSection" spacing="14.0" styleClass="quiz-question-panel" visible="false" managed="false"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" styleClass="quiz-question-topbar"> <children> <Label fx:id="questionNavLabel" styleClass="quiz-question-counter" text="Question 1 sur 1" /> <Label fx:id="answeredCounterLabel" styleClass="section-pill" text="0 / 0 repondues" /> <ProgressBar fx:id="questionProgressBar" progress="0.2" prefWidth="190.0" styleClass="quiz-progress-track" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label styleClass="quiz-language-badge" text="Navigation" /> <Label fx:id="timerBadgeLabel" styleClass="quiz-timer-badge,timer-badge" text="--:--" /> </children> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="liveScoreLabel" styleClass="section-pill" text="Score: 0 / 0" />
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="question-block"> <children> <Label fx:id="questionTextLabel" styleClass="question-title" wrapText="true" text="Question" /> <Label fx:id="questionFeedbackLabel" styleClass="course-empty-subtitle" text="" /> <VBox fx:id="answersContainer" spacing="10.0" /> </children> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <children> <Button fx:id="prevButton" onAction="#onPrevQuestion" styleClass="quiz-nav-button quiz-nav-prev" text="Question precedente" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button fx:id="nextButton" onAction="#onNextQuestion" styleClass="quiz-nav-button quiz-nav-next" text="Question suivante" /> <Button fx:id="finishButton" onAction="#onFinishQuiz" styleClass="quiz-nav-button quiz-nav-submit" text="Soumettre mes reponses" /> </children> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0" styleClass="quiz-quick-nav-wrap"> <children> <Label styleClass="quiz-quick-nav-title" text="Navigation rapide" /> <HBox fx:id="quickNavContainer" spacing="8.0" /> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="resultSection" spacing="12.0" styleClass="quiz-result-card" visible="false" managed="false"> <children> <Label fx:id="resultTitleLabel" styleClass="assessment-title" text="Resultat" /> <Label fx:id="resultSummaryLabel" styleClass="course-card-description" text="" /> <Label fx:id="resultScoreLabel" styleClass="result-score-badge" text="0 / 0" /> <Label fx:id="aiFeedbackLabel" styleClass="ai-feedback-box" text="" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <children> <Button fx:id="downloadCertButton" onAction="#onDownloadCertificate" styleClass="courses-action-btn primary" text="Télécharger le certificat" visible="false" managed="false" /> <Button onAction="#onRetry" styleClass="courses-action-btn primary" text="Recommencer la session" /> <Button onAction="#onCloseWindow" styleClass="courses-action-btn secondary" text="Quitter" /> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> </children> <padding> <Insets bottom="24.0" left="22.0" right="22.0" top="22.0" /> </padding> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
